title: Optimize logic and variable removal early in Dfg
body: After conversion of Ast to Dfg, but before synthesizing AstAlways into primitives, run a pass to remove variables that are not observable, and all logic that only computes such variables. This can get rid of a lot of content early so we don't build redundant Dfgs, and also enables synthesizing always blocks that use temporaries only in some branches, which will come in a follow up.
